core_idea: A jigsaw puzzle where stamp fragments merge into upgraded collectible stamps, then fill an album board.
ui_structure: Top HUD for currency, album progress, and settings
Merge Desk showing two matching fragments combining into a higher tier stamp
Jigsaw Album board as the main play space with open sockets and merge path feedback
Stamp Tray as the lower inventory and touch-friendly action area
art_direction: Warm vintage stamp album, aged paper, olive cloth panels, brass/gold accents, and collectible postage frames.
